title: Aequalis 64x
body:
![Image](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/47RRNgS7/images/619f8053c282d958641b6fb4fbfff3099d8bb36a.png)

### Discord Server: [https://discord.gg/DwMKzV4h](https://discord.gg/DwMKzV4h)

### About
Aequalis is a pack that focuses on making Minecraft a lot more realistic and immersive by making use of plethora of Optifine's Features and PBR textures while still trying to not stray *too far* from vanilla. This pack is still pretty early in development so expect tons of untextured blocks :v

You can find higher resolution version (128x - 256x) of my pack on my patreon here, https://www.patreon.com/SubiPng

Oh right, due to the amount stuff added into this pack, this pack is significantly heavier than other packs with the same resolution, so please keep that in mind.

### Pack Requirement

If you are on **Fabric**, make sure you have the following mods installed:
- **[Fabric](https://fabricmc.net/)**
- **[Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)**
- **[Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)**
- **[Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)**
- **[Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium)**
- **[Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)**

If you are on Forge, make sure you have **[Optifine](https://www.optifine.net/home)** Installed and make sure these settings are set correctly:
- "Quality Settings > Connected Textures" to Fancy
- "Quality Settings > Natural Textures" to Off
- "Quality Settings > Custom Colors" to On
- "Quality Settings > Custom Entity Models" to On
- "Quality Settings > Random Entities" to On
- "Quality Settings > Anisotropic Filtering" to Off
- "Detail Settings > Alternate Blocks" to On
- "Detail Settings > Trees" to Smart or Fancy
- "Performance Settings > Smart Animations" to On

### Shaders
As for shaders, i would personally recommend **[Bliss by Xonk](https://modrinth.com/shader/bliss-shader)**, but you can use any shaders that you like! Just make sure you have the right PBR format.
